series_metadata.series_description: Labels of drugs repackaged by and stored within a pharmacy prior to being dispensed shall contain name of drug, identification of repackaged or by name or six digits of their terminal distributor of dangerous drugs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three years or one year past manufacturer''s expiration date, whichever is greater ; Electronic: three years or one year past manufacturer''s expiration date, whichever is greater
